name: anything-to-okf
description: Convert files of ANY format — PDF, Word/.docx, PowerPoint/.pptx, Excel/.xlsx/.csv, HTML, Markdown, JSON/YAML, source code, plain text, images — into an Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundle: a directory of markdown files with YAML frontmatter, cross-links, and index.md files, conformant to OKF v0.1.
